title: Run the tool loop in-process
tagline: In Pie the tool-use loop runs inside the engine. User code detects a tool call, runs it in the same WASM module, feeds the result back into the KV cache — no client round-trip per call.
question: What's the temperature in Paris in Celsius? Use get_temperature, then fahrenheit_to_celsius.

naive.label: Naive
naive.sublabel: client-driven loop — each tool call ships out and back

events.value: engine ↔ client transport on every tool turn
→ engine emits, → client decodes, ⏳ client waits…
tool result: 72  (← client encodes, ← engine appends)
→ engine emits, → client decodes, ⏳ client waits…
tool result: 22.2  (← client encodes, ← engine appends)
✓ done  •  2 tool calls  •  RTT overhead about 243 ms  •  about 388 ms total

pie.label: Pie
pie.sublabel: tools run in the inferlet — same WASM, no transport

events.value: tool decoder reads the call, dispatcher runs it inline
✓ done  •  2 tool calls  •  0 RTT  •  about 68 ms total  •  5.7× wall-time
